labs.ECG: Inferior ST elevation 2mm in II, III, aVF; reciprocal in I, aVL

patient.income_context: Daily wage construction worker, ₹600/day, no insurance, lives in slum

question: 60M just walked into ED. Chest pain 4 hours, inferior ST elevation on ECG, troponin 0.18 ng/mL. Random glucose 340, HbA1c 9.8. BP 168/98. Aspirin allergy (rash only, no anaphylaxis). What's the immediate STEMI protocol AND what do I do about his blood sugar right now? He's uninsured, ₹600/day wage.
